root_cause: Path.parents was sliced in parent_run_from_path, which raises TypeError on Python 3.9.
Run-id parsing only covered legacy run_* shapes before repair, so v2 bucket/child RUN_CONTEXT files and some 6-digit legacy run IDs could not be normalized correctly.
Pre-rebuild mem_v1 tables referenced 1332 RUN_CONTEXT paths that are absent in the current checkout; all classified as stale_memory_entry.
V2 child lineage rows referenced bucket parents that lacked corresponding run.tsv rows when the bucket had no root RUN_CONTEXT.md.
